nav.store: Browse all products in the store
nav.account: Manage your profile, addresses, and orders
nav.cart: View items in your shopping bag

store.sortBy: Change the order in which products are displayed
store.filters: Narrow down products by category, price, or other criteria
store.latestArrivals: Products most recently added to the store

cart.subtotal: Total cost of items before shipping and taxes
cart.exclTaxes: Taxes and shipping costs will be calculated at checkout
cart.remove: Remove this item from your cart
cart.quantity: Change the quantity of this item

product.addToCart: Add this product to your shopping bag
product.selectVariant: Choose from available options like size or color
product.outOfStock: This product is currently unavailable for purchase
product.price: The current selling price of this product

checkout.shipping: Choose your delivery address and shipping method
checkout.payment: Enter your payment details to complete the order
checkout.review: Review your order before finalizing the purchase
checkout.email: We will send your order confirmation to this address
checkout.firstName: Your legal first name as it appears on your ID
checkout.lastName: Your legal last name as it appears on your ID
checkout.address: Street address where your order will be delivered
checkout.postalCode: Postal or ZIP code for your shipping address
checkout.phone: Phone number the courier can use to reach you
checkout.placeOrder: Complete your purchase and submit the order

account.profileCompletion: Fill in your profile details to get a personalized experience
account.savedAddresses: Addresses saved for faster checkout in the future
account.recentOrders: Your most recent purchases and their status

hero.headline: The main title displayed on the homepage hero banner
hero.tagline: The subtitle shown below the main headline

footer.rights: Copyright notice with current year and store name
